title: broadcast_to_group: mpsc send blocks if recipient channel is full
description: In state.rs broadcast_to_group(), tx.send(msg.clone()).await blocks until the channel has space or the receiver drops. Channel capacity is 64. A slow consumer (e.g. a client behind a very slow link) blocks the sender of the broadcast_to_group call for each full channel. In a group with 100 members and 10 slow consumers, one GROUP_SEND can block for up to 10 * channel-full-wait time before returning. This is a head-of-line blocking problem. Fix: use try_send() and treat send failures (full or closed) the same as offline: enqueue. Add a tracing::warn for full channels.
